name: Maurice James F. Englebert
headline: Maurice James F. Englebert
summary: « About 8 years of experience as an agriculturist in a pharmaceutical company specializing in forestry and farming products. « Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English. education: To be an Agriculturist in a federal or state controlled farm production company | 2002—Present: Agriculturist Consultant, Parke-Davis
